My blog
John Doe
About

"I'm a passionate web developer with a lifelong interest in technology. From a young age, I was captivated by the world of technology and had an eye for beautiful user interfaces.

I remember customizing ROMs on my phones, which sparked my fascination with software design. My journey then led me to the world of Linux, where I delved into the intricacies of open-source systems. It was here that I discovered my true calling —web development.

I thrive on the challenge of bringing code to life and creating stunning user interfaces that leave a lasting impression.

Tech Stack I Use

React

HTML5

CSS3

JavaScript

Linux

Git

npm

TypeScript

Node.js

Webpack

Projects
ChatGPT Multi-Model Chat Interface
Experience the power of ChatGPT with this interactive web application built using React and Node.js. Our project allows users to harness the capabilities of ChatGPT's diverse range of models using their API keys. Whether you need to engage in natural language conversations, perform translations, answer questions, or generate creative text, this platform empowers you to explore the full potential of ChatGPT effortlessly.
Custom Themes for yt-local
Elevating the visual experience of yt-local, a Python-based frontend for YouTube, we present a collection of custom themes that breathe new life into your YouTube browsing. Building upon the foundation of yt-local, these themes offer personalized aesthetics for users who crave a unique and visually appealing interface.
ChatGPT Multi-Model Chat Interface
Experience the power of ChatGPT with this interactive web application built using React and Node.js. Our project allows users to harness the capabilities of ChatGPT's diverse range of models using their API keys. Whether you need to engage in natural language conversations, perform translations, answer questions, or generate creative text, this platform empowers you to explore the full potential of ChatGPT effortlessly.
Contact
Let's Connect!
We'd love to hear from you. Whether you have a project in mind, a question to ask, or just want to say hello, don't hesitate to reach out. Fill out the form below, and we'll get back to you as soon as possible. Your feedback and inquiries are important to us, and we look forward to connecting with you.
